headline: MetLife (MET) Stock And The Valuation Puzzle After Strong Multi‑Year Gains
summary: If you are wondering whether MetLife stock at US$87.66 still offers value, it helps to zoom out from the headlines and look at what the current price actually implies. Over shorter horizons, the stock has posted returns of 3.9% over the past week, 9.9% over the past month, 9.1% year to date, and 15.2% over the last year, with 3 year and 5 year returns of 73.0% and 71.0% respectively. Recent coverage has focused on MetLife's positioning within the broader insurance sector and how investors...
